name: Miniature Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 oz.) sharp Cheddar cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cheese, butter, and cayenne.
2. Add flour and mix into a smooth dough. Wrap and chill for an hour or freeze for 30 minutes.
3. Form the chilled dough into 48 (1-inch) balls and press into miniature muffin tins.
4. Place 1/2 teaspoon filling in the center of each quiche, then 1 tablespoon custard.
5. Bake in a 400 degrees oven for 12 to 15 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes and remove from tins. Serve warm. You may freeze and reheat. Makes 48 quiches.
Custard Mix:
Mix together well. Any type of chopped meat or vegetable can be mixed with the custard mix to create a new filling. Be creative!
